author.name: ᴠɪᴄᴛᴏʀ ʙ‏ᴊᴇʟᴋʜᴏʟᴍ

content.text:
TIL that http://sci-hub.tw is blocked in Portugal / Vodafone PT. Wonder what reason they use as justification for that block.

https://sci-hub.se/ seems to be working fine though
